ItacAcademyItem.Name: Reali Juniores (Accademia dei-Compagnia della Calza)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One of the parties organized by this Accademia was described by Pancrazio Giustiniani in his Epistolae (1534)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
